allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Exorcist - Signal group chat ghost reaper

Add complete implementation with comprehensive test suite:
- Signal group chat monitoring via signal-cli
- Automatic removal of inactive members after configurable days
- Privacy-focused design \(only stores user IDs and timestamps\)
- Automatic initialization on first run
- Configurable cron schedules for sync and reap jobs

Features:
- Database layer with SQLite for group/member tracking
- Signal client wrapper for signal-cli integration
- Job system \(init, sync, reap\) with cron scheduling
- Docker and Railway deployment support
- MIT License

Tests:
- 18 comprehensive tests covering all core functionality
- Database operations \(CRUD, inactive detection, cascades\)
- Signal message parsing and client operations
- Job integration tests for sync, reap, and init workflows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
